nasb.text: Nicodemus *said to Him, “How can a man be born when he is old? He cannot enter a second time into his mother’s womb and be born, can he?”

esv.text: Nicodemus said to him, “How can a man be born when he is old? Can he enter a second time into his mother’s womb and be born?”

cnv.text: 尼哥德慕說：“人老了，怎能重生呢？難道他能再進母腹生出來嗎？”

ccb.text: 尼哥德慕说：“人老了，怎能重生呢？难道要再进母腹生一次吗？”

csbs.text: 尼克迪莫问：“人老了，怎么能出生呢？他难道能再进母腹又出生吗？”
